name: Baked Spaghetti
recipeIngredient: 28 oz can crushed tomatoes with liquid
4 ounces canned mushroom stems and pieces, drained
1 pound cooked and drained ground beef
10 3/4 cans condensed cream of mushroom soup, undiluted
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, sauté onion and green pepper in butter until tender.
2. Add crushed tomatoes, mushrooms, olives, and oregano. If desired, add ground beef.
3. Simmer, uncovered, for 10 minutes.
4. Place half of the spaghetti in a greased 13x9x2-inch baking dish.
5. Top with half of the vegetable mixture.
6. Sprinkle with 1 cup cheddar cheese.
7. Repeat layers.
8. Mix soup and water until smooth; pour over casserole.
9. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
10. Bake, uncovered, at 350°F for 30-35 minutes or until heated through.
Serves: 12
